name: powerpoint-mcp
description: PowerPoint automation for AI assistants - slides, shapes, text, tables, charts, images, notes, layouts & slide-to-image export - requires PowerPoint to be installed

scripts.clean: cd .. && dotnet build-server shutdown && dotnet clean src/PowerPointMcp.McpServer/PowerPointMcp.McpServer.csproj -c Release -nodeReuse:false
scripts.build:mcp-server: npm run clean && npm run clean:bin && cd .. && dotnet publish src/PowerPointMcp.McpServer/PowerPointMcp.McpServer.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:IncludeNativeLibrariesForSelfExtract=true -p:PublishTrimmed=false -p:PublishReadyToRun=false -p:NuGetAudit=false -nodeReuse:false -o vscode-extension/bin --verbosity minimal
scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run build:mcp-server && npm run copy:skills && npm run copy:changelog && npm run compile
